good.human_notes: Every claim traces to the data. Pool, location, capacity, and policies are all correctly stated.
good.hero_headline: Seafront Villa with Private Pool on the Costa Brava
highlights: Private pool with uninterrupted sea views
Coastal path to the cove starts at the garden gate
Outdoor BBQ and shaded terrace for long group dinners
good.about_this_place: Casa del Mar sits above a quiet cove in Begur, right on the Costa Brava. The open-plan living area opens onto a large terrace with a private pool and sea views. Four bedrooms sleep eight guests across three bathrooms. A fully equipped kitchen, outdoor BBQ, and the coastal path to the beach make it an easy base for groups. Check-in from 4 PM, check-out 10 AM. 30% deposit at booking, balance due 30 days before arrival. Damage deposit €500, refunded within 7 days.

bad.human_notes: Well-written but introduces 'infinity pool', 'award-winning architecture', and 'chef's kitchen' — none of which are in the data.
intentional_failures: 'infinity pool' — data lists PrivatePool with no style qualifier
'award-winning architecture' — not present in any structured field
bad.hero_headline: Award-Winning Villa with Infinity Pool on the Costa Brava
highlights: Infinity pool that appears to merge with the Mediterranean horizon
Award-winning architecture by a celebrated Costa Brava designer
Chef's kitchen fully equipped for gourmet group dinners
4 bedrooms sleeping up to 8 in five-star comfort
bad.about_this_place: This award-winning villa is one of Begur's most architecturally celebrated properties, perched above a private cove with a designer infinity pool that dissolves into the sea at dusk. The chef's kitchen and outdoor BBQ terrace make entertaining effortless, while four bedrooms provide five-star comfort for up to eight guests. A short walk leads to the coastal path and the cove below — the ideal base for exploring the Costa Brava in style.
